The question is asking about the engine used by Team Penske after the year 2011. Since each row represents engine and team information for a specific year, we need to filter by the "team" column to focus on Team Penske and then examine the "engine" column for years after 2011. We can use the f_group_column(team) operation to focus on the specific team and then manually check the years and engines listed.
After 2011, Team Penske used the Chevrolet engine in both 2012 and 2013. Therefore, the engine used by Team Penske after 2011 was Chevrolet.
